title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 16 December 2024.

items.title: Ciri has been recast in **The Witcher 4**
bullets: Ciara Berkeley has been cast as Ciri in The Witcher 4, replacing the characters' previous actor

items.title: Netflix’s **Squid Game: Unleashed** will be free for everyone at launch
bullets: For a limited time, Squid Game: Unleashed won't be locked behind a subscription paywall
Developed by internal studio Boss Fight Entertainment, Squid Game: Unleashed is a “party royale” game.

items.title: **Steel Paws** is a new mobile game from Yu Suzuki
Sega’s president calls **Sonic Superstars** a ‘disappointment’
bullets: “This time we have Sonic X Shadow Generations and the next Sonic movie, so we’re pushing things in the transmedia direction – movies and games working in harmony to make things bigger. But the core [of the experience] is the game. The game needs to be very good or else there is no transmedia effect.”

items.title: **Zenimax Online Studios** workers unionise
bullets: Union of 461 workers has been recognised by Microsoft

The union, called ZOS United-CWA, has been recognised by parent company Microsoft and is made of 461 members, including "web developers, designers, engineers, and graphic artists," the announcement said.
A majority of the unionised workers are based in Maryland, but they are also located across the US in California, New York, Pennsylvania, Texas, and Wisconsin.
This is the latest union to be created via CWA's Campaign to Organize Digital Employees (CODE-CWA), which the organisation says has seen over 6,000 workers unionise since 2020.

items.title: **Capcom** says it’s working on ‘re-activating other dormant IPs’ like Onimusha and Okami
